title: Site records decades of UFO sightings across Lowcountry, state
description: The recent release of previously classified military records of “close encounters” with Unidentified Flying Objects (UFOs) and potential extraterrestrial beings has tongues wagging. The post Site records decades of UFO sightings across Lowcountry, state appeared first on Charleston City Paper .

title: UFO investigator calls for UK government probe into chilling Scottish mysteries
description: A paranormal investigator who has written a string of books on UFOs has called for the UK government to launch a formal probe into UFO activity over Scotland after Pentagon disclosures

title: Paranormal investigator calls for Government probe into UFO activity in Scotland
description: Malcolm Robinson, has campaigned for the UK Government to "release the files" after a string of encounters in rural Scotland.

title: Washington archdiocese removes exorcist after UFO comments spark controversy
description: A controversy within the Catholic Church emerged after Monsignor Stephen Rossetti, a longtime exorcist in the Archdiocese of Washington, suggested in an online video that many UFO sightings could be connected to demonic activity. Cardinal Robert McElroy subsequently removed Rossetti from his role as an archdiocesan exorcist and ended the archdiocese's affiliation with the St. Michael Center for Spiritual Renewal, which Rossetti leads.

title: Archbishop removes exorcist priest over ‘demonic’ UFO comments
description: The exorcist of nearly 20 years issued his own statement, noting he is “saddened” by the archdiocese’s decision
